creator: pi@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!

> thanks for your updates on cego. I tried to run your patch in tinderbox
> and it seems there was an extra file added since last version (CegoSerial.h)
> which is not mentioned in plist. Could you please have a look at this
> log and confirm that this file must be added to pkg-plist?
> 
> https://redports.org/~culot/20120514083910-55543-24261/cego-2.13.0.log

Yes, this needs to be added to the pkg-plist.

-- 
pi@opsec.eu            +49 171 3101372                         8 years to go !
